markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handover to Erik, align on new content strategy, and address production blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New POC:** Erik O'Brien is the new Engagement Manager, taking over from Jenn Peters.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Production Blockers:** Articles require heavy rewriting due to weak story arcs and a lack of specific tone guidance, preventing them from being "ready to ship."](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Shift from disjointed articles to a cohesive series on "Advisory" to leverage a unique position and stand out from the crowded "Growth" topic.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
  - [**New Approach:** Build a multi-part narrative using existing assets (e.g., G's career podcast) and analyze competitor content for successful themes.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Production Inefficiency

  - [**Goal:** Maximize co-founder impact with minimal time investment.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [**Blockers:** Articles are not "ready to ship" due to two consistent issues:](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [**Weak Story Arc:** Repetitive structure; fails to build a compelling narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [**Missing Tone Guidance:** Lacks specific direction (e.g., controversial, diplomatic), forcing extensive rewrites to match the desired voice.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

### The Solution: A Strategic Pivot

  - [**Insight:** The "CMO1" article performed best because its controversial take sparked conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [**Decision:** Pivot from disjointed topics to a cohesive series on "Advisory."](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This topic is a unique strength where the team can "absolutely shine," unlike the crowded "Growth" space.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [**Series Focus:** Picking winners, building a collective, and getting paid in equity.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)

### The Model: Learning from Competitors

  - [**Analysis:** Study competitors (e.g., Elena Verna, Hypolder) for successful themes and distribution tactics (frequency, tone, graphics).](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Inspiration:** Airbyte's thought leadership series provides a relevant model.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create a new category ("agentic data infrastructure") using co-founder interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
      - [**Method:** A 12-week series builds a story arc, starting with market changes and evolving into the need for new standards.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Guillaume & Giulia:**](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
      - [Define the "Advisory" series strategy and sub-topics.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
      - [Provide a list of competitor thought leaders for analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
      - [Send the French podcast transcript for the series' first piece.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
      - [Analyze competitor content for successful themes and tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Use the French podcast transcript to draft the first article in the "Advisory" series.](https://fathom.video/share/gxKxKZe7_QHDSweZPFHsvgVNWSW8-KTG?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
